lines.text: One formality. Registration is provisional until the shrine
demonstrates one — (reading) — "verified wonder, witnessed by an officer
of rank." I return at the full moon.
What— what qualifies? Is there a list? A form?
The dedication line I leave blank. Shrines declare to whom
at consecration. …Think carefully. Those words outlive towns.
Two weeks to ship a miracle. No spec. One reviewer. …So — a normal
